query: 我的项目 docs/ 下面有 spec/、plan/、RFC/、task/ 一堆 md 文档,想做个看板能在浏览器里集中浏览,不要 web server 那种,就是个 html 打开就能用
i've got like 70 markdown files spread across docs/PRD, docs/spec/concept and docs/spec/module — wanna bundle these into one index.html i can keep open as a side panel while coding
把 D:\projects\foo\docs\ 下所有 md 汇总成一个 dashboard,含 frontmatter 算的进度条,刷新就能看到最新状态
我们 Sourcery 现在的 scripts/build_docs_html.py 太长了 · 帮我抽出来做成项目无关的工具 · 不要硬编码路径
I want to add a kanban view to my markdown notes where each note has yaml frontmatter like status: in-progress and progress: 60, and they show up as cards by status column
可以给我做一个 docs/index.html 把项目的 PRD spec plan rfc 都集中起来 · 改 md 之后跑一下脚本能自动更新
I have ~/Documents/myproject/docs and i want a single offline-openable file that aggregates everything and renders markdown nicely with sidebar nav
项目进度看板 · 文档驱动那种 · 每个 module spec 文件 frontmatter 写 status + progress + sprint · 自动算总进度
build me a docs preview that scans docs/spec/module/M*.md and shows them grouped by status as a kanban — running offline, no need for a server
把 docs/plan/round-3-build-house.md 这些 plan 文档 + roadmap 子目录的 md 全部集中到一个 html 文件里,左侧 sidebar 可以点开
render this single README.md to HTML so I can preview it in my browser
set up a Sphinx documentation site for my Python library, with autodoc for the modules in src/mylib/
I want a multi-page static site like Docusaurus for our product docs — multiple sections, search, dark mode, deploy to vercel
convert these 8 markdown files to a single PDF and merge them in chapter order
explain to me how YAML frontmatter parsing works in Python with the pyyaml library
我要给我的 GitHub README 加几个 status badge · 比如 build / coverage / version 那种
build a Jira-like kanban board where my team can drag cards between columns and assign owners — real-time sync via websockets
我想要个像 Notion 一样的内部 wiki · 多人协作可以编辑那种 · 还要权限管理
写一个 Python 脚本扫描 ~/Downloads 目录然后把所有 csv 文件的列名提取出来
帮我写个 GitHub Action,push 到 main 的时候自动 deploy 我的 docs 到 GitHub Pages
